response.justification: The candidate has extensive full-stack development experience with relevant technologies like TypeScript, Node.js, React, and MongoDB. They have worked on complex projects, demonstrated ownership, and have a strong background in software craftsmanship and testing.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience with relevant technologies
Strong background in software craftsmanship and testing
Experience with AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling
concerns: Some technologies like Nest.js and Vitest are not explicitly mentioned
Some projects are not directly related to the enterprise context
